programme.title: E2
programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela’s”, he was unaware that it was to become the foremost outfitting store in the world. So it is fitting that his son is on a quest to explore the Hard Truths of conservation. Join Dan Cabela on this high-impact journey of discovery as he uncovers some of lesser known facts in the conservation world. In particular, the role that hunting and the utilization of wildlife can play as a modern day conservation tool.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: Meet the mob of ‘street smart’ kangaroos moving into Australia’s capital city and the ecologists following their every move. Over one year we follow mob leader Black Spot and kangaroo mum Madge with her two young joeys – mischievous Sonny and tiny pouch bound Alice. After 15 years of drought, Canberra’s Eastern Grey Kangaroos know that the parks and gardens of Australia’s “bush capital” provide a reliable supply of the juicy grass but learning to be a street-smart urban ‘roo is tough with the kangaroos negotiating busy roads and avoiding cars and dogs. Inevitably their incursion into human habitat causes problems – damage to property and collisions with cars. It’s costing millions and thousands of animals are killed each year. The farmers complain that the ‘roos are eroding farmland and damaging their fences. The ACT Government holds an annual kangaroo cull to reduce animal numbers to “sustainable levels”. Confrontations make international news as the situation arouses passions and pol

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela’s”, he was unaware that it was to become the foremost outfitting store in the world. programme.title: E2
programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela’s”, he was unaware that it was to become the foremost outfitting store in the world. programme.title: E1
programme.desc: This film follows the inspiring relationship between whale whisperer Vicki Neville and the humpback whales of Australia. Never-before-seen behaviours have been documented by a team of five cinematographers over the three-month whale season in Hervey Bay, all captured in glorious 4K. These stunning close encounters capture whales like you have never seen them before!

programme.title: E6 - Bangladesh
programme.desc: With their travels taking them to Asia, Rooftop and Catfish find themselves spending several dangerous days in Bangladesh. The pair put their bodies and safety to the test harvesting honey the Bangladeshi way, transporting workers via row boat, deconstructing ships for scrap metal, and trying to clean one of the country’s rare public restrooms. They test out Bangladeshi cuisine in the form of fish, cow stomach, and goat brain curry, and race some locals on their rickshaw bikes. The trip concludes with Rooftop and Catfish heading out of town by train- only running across the top. With all of Bangladesh’s physical dangers, can the BMX bikers make it out without a hospital visit?

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: Meet the mob of ‘street smart’ kangaroos moving into Australia’s capital city and the ecologists following their every move. Over one year we follow mob leader Black Spot and kangaroo mum Madge with her two young joeys – mischievous Sonny and tiny pouch bound Alice. After 15 years of drought, Canberra’s Eastern Grey Kangaroos know that the parks and gardens of Australia’s “bush capital” provide a reliable supply of the juicy grass but learning to be a street-smart urban ‘roo is tough with the kangaroos negotiating busy roads and avoiding cars and dogs. Inevitably their incursion into human habitat causes problems – damage to property and collisions with cars. It’s costing millions and thousands of animals are killed each year. The farmers complain that the ‘roos are eroding farmland and damaging their fences. The ACT Government holds an annual kangaroo cull to reduce animal numbers to “sustainable levels”. Confrontations make international news as the situation arouses passions and pol

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela’s”, he was unaware that it was to become the foremost outfitting store in the world. So it is fitting that his son is on a quest to explore the Hard Truths of conservation. Join Dan Cabela on this high-impact journey of discovery as he uncovers some of lesser known facts in the conservation world. In particular, the role that hunting and the utilization of wildlife can play as a modern day conservation tool.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela’s”, he was unaware that it was to become the foremost outfitting store in the world. So it is fitting that his son is on a quest to explore the Hard Truths of conservation. Join Dan Cabela on this high-impact journey of discovery as he uncovers some of lesser known facts in the conservation world. In particular, the role that hunting and the utilization of wildlife can play as a modern day conservation tool.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: This film follows the inspiring relationship between whale whisperer Vicki Neville and the humpback whales of Australia. Never-before-seen behaviours have been documented by a team of five cinematographers over the three-month whale season in Hervey Bay, all captured in glorious 4K. These stunning close encounters capture whales like you have never seen them before!

programme.title: E6 - Bangladesh
programme.desc: With their travels taking them to Asia, Rooftop and Catfish find themselves spending several dangerous days in Bangladesh. The pair put their bodies and safety to the test harvesting honey the Bangladeshi way, transporting workers via row boat, deconstructing ships for scrap metal, and trying to clean one of the country’s rare public restrooms. They test out Bangladeshi cuisine in the form of fish, cow stomach, and goat brain curry, and race some locals on their rickshaw bikes. The trip concludes with Rooftop and Catfish heading out of town by train- only running across the top. With all of Bangladesh’s physical dangers, can the BMX bikers make it out without a hospital visit?

programme.title: E3 - Highlight 3
programme.desc: Crouch Recovery Op Jim and heavy mechanic Jack are faced with an increasingly complex recovery challenge. A foreign truck with dodgy suspension airbags and a catalogue of other problems makes towing it anywhere a real headache and a potential threat to other road users. Lantern Recovery op Sean is in a race against time to get a fully loaded dual tanker off a busy stretch of motorway. And recovery op Merrie has a nightmare when an unforeseeable problem leaves her stranded in a live lane of the motorway when towing a car transporter.

programme.title: E8 - No Guts, No Glory
programme.desc: In the season finale, survival expert Bear Grylls selects the winner of $500,000 after a relentless journey to New Zealand’s West Coast --‐ a wet, rainforest amidst torrential downpour where only one team will “Get Out Alive”.

programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela’s”, he was unaware that it was to become the foremost outfitting store in the world. So it is fitting that his son is on a quest to explore the Hard Truths of conservation. Join Dan Cabela on this high-impact journey of discovery as he uncovers some of lesser known facts in the conservation world. In particular, the role that hunting and the utilization of wildlife can play as a modern day conservation tool.

programme.title: E16
programme.desc: 高中畢業出身會計師張浩宇面對大型會計師事務所的不正之風，以最不像會計師的方式實現正義。

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 無論過去、現在、未來，每個別具意義的相遇都造就華麗的日子，且無論什麼人都曾經擁有過華麗的日子。事業、愛情兩得意的能力者李志赫遇上責任感強陽光開朗的咖啡廳經理兼室內設計師池恩悟。兩人儘管外表看似光鮮亮麗，但在經歷人生的低潮後仍守在對方身邊，克服各種試驗，找到人生的真諦。

programme.title: E14
programme.desc: 當紅主播許妍（趙露思飾）和都會精英沈皓明（陳偉霆飾）是一對人人艷羨慕的夫妻，看似十分般配的兩人，由於出生環境的差異，始終難以融入對方的圈子。許妍靠著光鮮的主持人身分和「精心裝點」的身世順利和沈皓明步入婚姻，而這一切盡在沈皓明的掌握下。衝突來臨，許妍脫離沈皓明的掌控一去不回頭。沈皓明卻發現自己早已陷入愛情，想要全力追回許妍。經歷種種，兩人終於撕掉外表的偽裝，重新靠近，會見彼此的內在，也重新認識自己。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 一位正直的明星律師兼忠實粉絲，在偶像被指控謀殺後挺身而出，為他辯護。「孟世娜」是擁有豐富經歷的刑事辯護律師，同時是偶像團體Gold Boys的十年以上的忠實粉絲。在Gold Boys的主唱「都來益」因捲入殺人事件而成為嫌疑人時，她隱藏了自己的崇拜之情，為他辯護，並揭示了一個意想不到的真相。

programme.title: E16
programme.desc: 高中畢業出身會計師張浩宇面對大型會計師事務所的不正之風，以最不像會計師的方式實現正義。

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: 二百年後兩個神祕的女人，突然出現在超級富有的丹氏家族，沒人知道她們是誰。但隨後這兩位女子意識到，在前世她們與丹氏家族的每位成員，都有着密不可分的關係。

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 無論過去、現在、未來，每個別具意義的相遇都造就華麗的日子，且無論什麼人都曾經擁有過華麗的日子。事業、愛情兩得意的能力者李志赫遇上責任感強陽光開朗的咖啡廳經理兼室內設計師池恩悟。兩人儘管外表看似光鮮亮麗，但在經歷人生的低潮後仍守在對方身邊，克服各種試驗，找到人生的真諦。

programme.title: E14
programme.desc: 當紅主播許妍（趙露思飾）和都會精英沈皓明（陳偉霆飾）是一對人人艷羨慕的夫妻，看似十分般配的兩人，由於出生環境的差異，始終難以融入對方的圈子。許妍靠著光鮮的主持人身分和「精心裝點」的身世順利和沈皓明步入婚姻，而這一切盡在沈皓明的掌握下。衝突來臨，許妍脫離沈皓明的掌控一去不回頭。沈皓明卻發現自己早已陷入愛情，想要全力追回許妍。經歷種種，兩人終於撕掉外表的偽裝，重新靠近，會見彼此的內在，也重新認識自己。

programme.title: E43 - The Calculator
programme.desc: Watches, speakers, toilets... Maestro takes a fascinating look at some of our most everyday objects, both old and new. How exactly to they work? What is their history?

programme.title: Oscar ET Malika, Toujours En Retard S3
programme.desc: Oscar and Malika walk to school together. Every morning, they face funny, absurd or ridiculous situations and live improbable adventures.

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil S7
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: E6 - Things Aren't Getting Any Better
programme.desc: Jessika Walsh reads the FLA manifesto live on national television. The whole population is aghast to learn of the kidnapping of Governor Sylvestre. Hamelin stands firm: he triggers the law that puts the country on a war footing!

programme.title: Safe To Fly
programme.desc: Heathrow Airport is developing a new way to analyze security information. The system known as 'TASS' brings together different data sources and offers security experts a single interface to see what is happening on the ground.

programme.title: The Word on Problem Solving
programme.desc: Say what?! This episode focuses on the importance of reading math problems very carefully in order to fully understand the problem at hand. Because if you don't answer the right question, how can the solution ever be right?

programme.title: What's Living in This Cave?
programme.desc: Bat colonies in caves bring a whole world of creatures with them. Cockroaches and centipedes love their guano. Snakes and frogs are happy to have bats for dinner.

programme.title: Eggcellent Adventure
programme.desc: Darwin and Newts find a mysterious egg on the beach, and try to find out who it might belong to. They discover it's a sea turtle when the whole beach hatches at once!

programme.title: An A-mazing Winter Adventure
programme.desc: The kids must find their way out of Yoko's magical snow labyrinth in order to get to Ranger Loops' puppet show on time!

programme.title: Body Swap
programme.desc: Cleopatra makes a cunning plan. She builds a body swap machine that overtakes Sprinter's body without anybody noticing. She fails to see that when she gets Sprinter's body, he gets hers.

programme.title: Thunder and Lightning
programme.desc: The Cloud Whale is struggling with mood swings that result in massive storms with lightning and thunder. Cleopatra sees possibilities in the destructive powers. She wants to steal some of the Cloud Whale's lightning bolts to catch Sprinter.

programme.title: The Aral Sea
programme.desc: Kit is rusting in the toxic desert of the former Aral Sea.

programme.title: Water in the City
programme.desc: Mr. Battery is flushed into the city's water pipeline and wastewater system.

programme.title: New Zealand
programme.desc: Explored Auckland's War Memorial Museum, Waitomo's glowworms, Queenstown's skyline gondola, 415-ft bungy jump at Kawaru Bridge, and a thrilling shotover jet ride-unforgettable week in New Zealand!

programme.title: Maui
programme.desc: Explored Maui, Hawaii: Scuba lessons with turtles, Piiholo Ranch's longest zip line, Haiku rainforest hike, and capped the day with Ululani's Shave Ice. Final day included standup paddle boarding and surfing lessons. Adventure-packed week in paradise!

programme.title: Teardrop Explodes!
programme.desc: If a lifetime's worth of tears fell in one MASSIVE drop, what would it look like? Dr Xand does a poo for the benefit of science. And minds are bent by street artist Xandsy!

programme.title: The Girl Who Cried Alien
programme.desc: On the principal that the Boy Who Cried Wolf was eventually ignored, Teresa reports false UFO sightings all over Cucurtown to lure the townspeople into complacency before the real attack.

programme.title: Andrew Basso: Enthralling Escapologist
programme.desc: Andrew Basso is an escapologist performer who holds the GUINNESS WORLD RECORDS title for the fastest time to escape from a water tank upside down with restrained hands and feet. Learn how he copes with fear during his performances and what happens when they go wrong.

programme.desc: Just when everyone seems to have forgotten, the creatures of Kiwifruit Valley give Newts her most magical birthday ever.

programme.title: E10 - Grapefruit
programme.desc: Grapefruit dedicates the song 'All My Friends' to the pals who go with her everywhere.

programme.title: E15 - Merry Sprouty Day Part 2
programme.desc: Evil Pea steals Supertato's brand new Tato Car but doesn't realise that the Grape Kids are in the back seat. Supertato has to get the Grape Kids back to safety and save his car.

programme.title: E109 - Together
programme.desc: Dipsy and Laa-Laa drive to the Hidey Hup in the Tubby Car. They meet Tinky Winky and Po and the Teletubbies go on the Tubby Uppy Downy together.

programme.title: E3 - Carrot
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'carrot' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. We see lots of carrots!

programme.title: E7 - Down The Drain
programme.desc: Messy borrows Zoe's umbrella, and it gets swept away by the rain. Messy and his friends go on a white-water adventure down the drain in search for it.

programme.title: E14 - The Shopping Badge
programme.desc: Duggee loves to shop local, so the Big Shop is a Big Deal for him. He's over-excited and wants two of everything. The Squirrels have to remind him 'we only popped in for milk!'

programme.title: E15 - Say Cheese
programme.desc: The Squirrels learn about butterflies and tortoises.

programme.title: E14 - Takeaway
programme.desc: Forced to wait five minutes in front of a restaurant for their takeaway, Bluey and Bingo become restless for entertainment, pushing the very limits of Dad's patience.

programme.title: E17 - Fancy Restaurant
programme.desc: Bingo and Bluey want mum and dad to smoochy kiss, so they set up a romantic evening for two at their fancy restaurant. Everything goes to plan, until chef Bingo's special arrives.

programme.title: E33 - Granny Mobile
programme.desc: Muffin is playing Grouchy Granny at a garage sale, making Dad push her on an old mobility scooter, but when a real Grouchy Granny wants to buy it, Muffin won't budge.

programme.title: E8 - Andy And The Pufferfish
programme.desc: Andy heads to Japan to record a video of a male pufferfish building its nest in the sand.

programme.title: E41 - The Grandparents Badge
programme.desc: Duggee and the squirrels are tidying up - its Bring your Grandparents to Squirrel Club Day. Duggee has his Grandparents badge so he knows what they will like, a nice cup of tea.

programme.title: E40 - Duck Flies
programme.desc: Duck sees some flying, migrating ducks in the sky and decides he would like to try it too.

programme.title: E16 - Phones
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want to play restaurants with Grandad, but it's a little different than he's used to... he's going to need an app to order the food!

programme.title: E17 - Pavlova
programme.desc: Mum won't let Bingo have Pavlova, so the kids find a way by playing a cheeky game of Cafe in the kitchen. But Dad the chef sets up a competing shop that only serves edamame beans.

programme.title: E15 - The Future Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels are transported into the future where they encounter a robot Duggee!

programme.title: E30 - Pan-American Highway, Panama
programme.desc: The team's Pan-American road trip leads them to discover that Glitch is building a road through the Darien Gap. Can they save this important habitat and protect the local sloths?

programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want to play restaurants with Grandad, but it's a little different than he's used to... he's going to need an app to order the food!

programme.title: E17 - Pavlova
programme.desc: Mum won't let Bingo have Pavlova, so the kids find a way by playing a cheeky game of Cafe in the kitchen. But Dad the chef sets up a competing shop that only serves edamame beans.

programme.title: E31 - Go Jet Academy: Lightning Bolt Blackout
programme.desc: When lightning strikes Academy Island, it causes a power cut. Can the Go Jetters rescue their trapped friends without the power they need to call for Click-ons?

programme.title: E10 - Grapefruit
programme.desc: Grapefruit dedicates the song 'All My Friends' to the pals who go with her everywhere.

programme.title: E15 - Merry Sprouty Day Part 2
programme.desc: Evil Pea steals Supertato's brand new Tato Car but doesn't realise that the Grape Kids are in the back seat. Supertato has to get the Grape Kids back to safety and save his car.

programme.title: E24 - Swophenge
programme.desc: Nori and Preston are creating a circle of standing stones, just like the ancients of Swoppiton used to make. The stones are big - will it take more than Mojo's crane top to move them?

programme.title: E15 - The Love Badge
programme.desc: When Duggee gets a card from someone he loves, the Squirrels ask: does he still love them? In a show-stopping song, Delivery Chipmunk shows them the answer is a resounding YES.

programme.title: E18 - Piggyback
programme.desc: The Heelers take a long riverside walk, but Bingo's legs are tired, and she wants a piggyback. To distract her, mum and dad invent fun games and get her little legs moving again.

programme.title: E33 - Granny Mobile
programme.desc: Muffin is playing Grouchy Granny at a garage sale, making Dad push her on an old mobility scooter, but when a real Grouchy Granny wants to buy it, Muffin won't budge.

programme.title: E9 - Andy And The Capuchins
programme.desc: Andy heads to Brazil and meets a troop of capuchin monkeys who lead him to some honey.

programme.title: E41 - The Grandparents Badge
programme.desc: Duggee and the squirrels are tidying up - its Bring your Grandparents to Squirrel Club Day. Duggee has his Grandparents badge so he knows what they will like, a nice cup of tea.

programme.title: E14 - Yong Bao And The Tiger
programme.desc: Yong Bao tells Thomas the story of how he came to have a magnificent tiger emblem on his tender.

programme.title: E40 - Duck Flies
programme.desc: Duck sees some flying, migrating ducks in the sky and decides he would like to try it too.

programme.title: News[Live]
programme.desc: Watch the latest international top stories, The News every 30 minutes with the emphasis on debate, dialogue, role of cultural differences, analytics of key events all over the world, comments, hot topics of the day, reports.

programme.title: Focus
programme.desc: Keep up with the latest news from all over the globe with Focus on France 24. Focus programme provides exclusive reports from Monday to Friday at 7.50 am Paris time. Find out what's going on in the world of economy, politics, culture, sport, medicine, ecology. Focus has it all covered for you. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: Focus
programme.desc: Keep up with the latest news from all over the globe with Focus on France 24. Focus programme provides exclusive reports from Monday to Friday at 7.50 am Paris time. Find out what's going on in the world of economy, politics, culture, sport, medicine, ecology. Focus has it all covered for you. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: US Squawk Box
programme.desc: “Squawk Box” is the ultimate pre-market morning news and talk program, where the biggest names in business and politics tell their most important stories. Anchored by Joe Kernen, Becky Quick and Andrew Ross Sorkin, the show brings Wall Street to Main Street. It's a must-see for everyone from the professional trader to the casual investor.

programme.title: Halftime Report

programme.title: Closing Bell
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC's Scott Wapner, “Closing Bell” guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what's driving them and how investors are reacting.

European Narcos - Part 1 - The Wealth Of A Nation
programme.desc: For centuries, Dutch prosperity has been based on global trade. But this has always had a dark side. Drugs, like opium and cocaine, are traded too.

programme.title: Blind Trust
programme.desc: Stefan Orben is a marathon enthusiast and completely blind. To pursue his passion, he needs another person to guide him along the 42.195 kilometers. Luckily his fiance Nico is happy to run with him. And that is not all - Stefan and Nico love helping others run. They hope more people will train to become running guides so that sport becomes open to all.

programme.title: Art Born Of Pain: Frida Kahlo
programme.desc: She may be the world's most famous female painter. Her house in Mexico is a place of pilgrimage: Frida Kahlo! She endured pain her entire life and died young. Today, she is still a cult figure. Why?

programme.title: E4 - Let's Play & Learn Outside with JJ!
programme.desc: It's time to play & learn outside with JJ! First, JJ & Cody spend the day taking care of their pets Bingo, Pickles & Jellybean. Then, it's time for a trip to Grandpa's farm to learn about all the animals & the sounds they make! The outdoor fun continues at the park, where JJ discovers tadpoles & learns he'll grow big one day too. The day ends with an exciting soccer match where the kids challenge their parents to a game!

programme.title: E6 - Calm Songs & Sweet Dreams!
programme.desc: Join Twinkle for some fun adventures & sleepy songs! First, help Twinkle find Sandy the Seagull while learning what sounds a pig, duck & cow make along the way! Then, Bunny leads Twinkle on an exciting adventure into the forest to find a mysterious box. After a long day of playing, it's time for some sleepy songs. Listen as Mr. Moon sings a soothing lullaby to help Twinkle drift off to sleep for a peaceful night's rest.

programme.title: E3 - Songs About Feeling Good & Staying Safe!
programme.desc: Join Kii & Yii for songs about feeling good & staying safe! First, learn the best way to get a healthy smile in a fun & educational song about how to brush your teeth properly. Then, learn how to be safe when you're riding a bike at the playground. The lessons continue as Kii & Yii sing about being kind to each other, especially when a friend is sick. From learning colors to singing a soothing lullaby, these songs will make you feel good!

programme.title: E1 - Animals, Numbers, ABCs & More Fun!
programme.desc: Get ready to learn about animals, numbers, ABCs & more! Join Kii & Yii as they head to Old MacDonald's farm to learn all the sounds the animals make. Then it's time to learn numbers by singing along & counting the five cute penguins & five little ducks! The learning continues with a fun animal bus ride, a trip to space to sing 'Hey Diddle Diddle' & an important lesson on how to cross the road carefully with a mother cat & her kitten.

programme.title: E3 - A Big Playtime Sing-Along!
programme.desc: Get ready for a big playtime sing-along with Mia & Max! First, they play a fun fishing game in the garden with Mummy & Daddy, learning their colors as they catch different colored fish. Then, Mia & Maple learn to play together by setting up a super cute tea party with all their cuddly toys. The playtime fun continues as Mia & Max pretend to be puppies, crawling & barking while singing the classic song 'BINGO!' with their parents.

programme.title: E3 - Songs About Feeling Good & Staying Safe!

From learning colors to singing a soothing lullaby, these songs will make you feel good!

The Power

programme.title: 2 Good 2 Be True[Live]
programme.desc: Ali, a hardworking nurse with big dreams, crosses paths with Eloy, a clever mechanic secretly living a double life as a con artist and law student. Their rocky first meeting leads to an unexpected partnership involving a wealthy old man, hidden identities, family secrets, and emotional healing. As love grows amid deception, the series explores trust, redemption, and second chances, blending romance, comedy, and drama.

programme.title: Blood Vs. Duty[Live]
programme.desc: Two brothers separated in a maritime tragedy grow up on opposite sides of the law - one a dedicated Intelligence Officer, the other fiercely protective of the Tausug family that raised him. When a corruption case pits them against each other, their long-buried secret threatens to ignite a war between blood and loyalty.

programme.title: The Alibi[Live]
programme.desc: Vincent, an heir to a news empire, gets accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real as their shared wounds and ambitions draw them together. But when they uncover the truth, the two are compelled to confront their true feelings.

programme.title: It's Showtime[Live]
programme.desc: The venue for Pinoys to strut and display their unique talents for all the world to see. Led by a powerhouse cast of popular celebrities - Vhong Navarro, Anne Curtis, Ogie Alcasid, Karylle, Jhong Hilario and Vice Ganda to name a few.

programme.title: Goin' Bulilit S15[Live]
programme.desc: A gag show with child actors playing adult roles, doing gags, sketches and segments. Instead of playing roles based on their own age, child actors are made to portray adult characters like Doctors, Teachers, Married Couples, etc.

programme.title: Savdhaan India -Naya Adhyay
programme.desc: The host provides an in-depth analysis of some of the most shocking real-life crime stories in India and sheds light on how the victims fought back for justice.

programme.title: Na Umra Ki Seema Ho
programme.desc: Vidhi, a young woman, falls in love with Devratha, a middle-aged tycoon. Together they embark on a journey of love, and acceptance beyond the barrier of age.

programme.title: Saraswati Chandra
programme.desc: Saraswati Chandra calls off his marriage with Kumud, eventually leading to her being married off to a drunkard. Years later, Kumud, now a widow, comes face-to-face with Saraswati.

E604 - Sir Blaze And The Unicorn
programme.desc: Witness the return of Sir Blaze and Sir AJ as they embark on an epic quest to free a magical unicorn from an unpoppable bubble!

programme.title: E404 - Dojobot / A Shark's Life
programme.desc: Kai's Dojobot for training the Deer Squad is stolen by Baron Bite who turns it against them! // Lady Fluffpot spots a sea Monster whilst swimming at the beach!

programme.title: E813 - Pups Save A Show Jumper
programme.desc: Winnie Winnington goes looking for a frog to enter in a frog-jumping contest and ends up needing rescued in a swamp.

programme.title: E211 - Private Club
programme.desc: Barbabeau, Barbabelle, and Barbabright have built a treehouse.

programme.title: E225 - Living Together / Holey The Snowman
programme.desc: For the very first time, the Barbababies will take the train and sleep in a hotel. // Barbouille crafted a magnificent snowman that the children named Bobo.

programme.title: E121 - The Crew Fixes The Talent Show Stage / The Crew Builds Instruments
programme.desc: When Speed Meister sabotages the stage for the town Talent Show, the pups use Motor's talent to save the day. // Sierra Sparkle is coming to sing for Builder Cove Day! But when the band's instruments break, Rubble & Crew have a construction solution.

programme.title: E404 - Dojobot / A Shark's Life
programme.desc: Kai's Dojobot for training the Deer Squad is stolen by Baron Bite who turns it against them! // Lady Fluffpot spots a sea Monster whilst swimming at the beach!

programme.title: E201 - Happy Parky
programme.desc: Tim and Kai try to give Parky the best day ever.

programme.title: E201 - Storm
programme.desc: When a storm keeps the Rexes at home they must think of a game to pass the time.

programme.title: E113 - Stuck On You / Pest Friend
programme.desc: Daisy worries she and Winston will be stuck together forever when they get tangled in Winston's jump rope. // Daisy and Mr. Crocodile try to help Roland find a best friend to take to an acorn show.

programme.title: E605 - Race To Sky High Mountain
programme.desc: At the starting line for Race to Sky High Mountain, one of Crusher's cheats threatens to sideline Blaze for good. To get back in this race, Blaze will need... Power Tires!

programme.title: E606 - Sparkle's Racing Badge
programme.desc: It's more Blaze family fun in this high octane, action-packed adventure as Blaze and his sister Sparkle team up to make it back to the Monster Dome in time for a big race.

programme.title: E104 - The Crew Builds A Playground / The Crew Fixes A Roof
programme.desc: After Speed Meister builds an unsafe playground, the Rubble & Crew get creative and build a whole new one with old materials. // The town Chili Cookaroo is threatened when City Hall's roof starts to cave in! Luckily, the pups know just how to fix it.

programme.title: E105 - The Crew Builds A Car Wash / The Crew Plans Grandpa Day
programme.desc: Mayor Greatway needs her muddy motorcycle cleaned fast! Wheeler and the pups jump into action to build a solution before the big race. // It's Grandpa Gravel's special day! But when the pups are needed, they have to change their Grandpa Day plans.

programme.title: E103 - Boris / Born To Be Wild
programme.desc: The barbababies find a lost baby elephant and secretly look after it. How will Barbapapa and Barbamama react to Boris? // Boris the elephant misses home. The Barbapapa decide to bring him back to Africa. On the spot, they help Boris to acclimatize.

programme.title: E104 - Making Bread / From One Pit To Another
programme.desc: Barbapapa wants to teach his children to make bread, but things don't go as planned... // The Barbababies plant an avocado tree. However, it takes years before the first harvest. Barbabright has an idea to save time that may well lead to...disaster.

programme.title: E606 - George's Racing Car
programme.desc: It's a beautiful day, but Peppa, George, Daddy Pig, and Grandpa Pig are sitting inside watching racecar driving on television!

programme.title: E111 - Tide and Prejudice
programme.desc: The Thundermans are visited by High Tide, the former protector of Secret Shores. But when they explain to him that they are the new superheroes in town, he decides to take back his old role, even if it puts Jinx and Booch in danger.

programme.title: E512 - The Whole Bilsky Family
programme.desc: Henry's nerves are put the test when Piper invites her new boyfriend and his family over for dinner.

programme.title: E107 - The Birthweek Song
programme.desc: Tori struggles to find the perfect birthday gift for Trina, then decides to write her sister a song as a present. An ungrateful Trina turns the song into cash by selling it, enraging Tori.

programme.title: E101 - Best Summer Ever?
programme.desc: Jack & Lily are half-siblings living on opposite ends of the world both hoping to have the 'best summer ever.' When dangerous events forces Jack's mom to send him to live with his dad, the kids fear their summer dreams have become a nightmare.

programme.title: E416 - Toddler Invasion
programme.desc: When The Toddler takes control of the Man Cave, Charlotte and Jasper have to find a way to sneak into the Man Cave and free Kid Danger and Captain Man.

programme.title: E211 - iGive Away a Car
programme.desc: The gang runs a contest on iCarly -- the prize is a new car courtesy of a local dealership. After Nevel wins, the kids discover that the dealership had no knowledge of the contest or the free car they were supposedly donating.

programme.title: E202 - Mutantweight Title Bout
programme.desc: All of Raph's dreams have come true as he fights Rocksteady, Bebop, and Mondo Gecko in the underground Mutant Battle Arena. But he doesn't realize he's walked right into a trap set by Kitsune and her street gang, the Purple Dragons!

programme.title: E244 - Pineapple RV
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick turn the pineapple into a mobile home to take Squidward on the road trip he deserves.

programme.title: E226 - Chatterbox Gary / Don't Feed the Clowns
programme.desc: Gary has a pet translation collar, and he's talking up a storm. Everyone loves it... except for Squidward! // When a small clown gets left behind by the circus, SpongeBob takes the hapless harlequin under his wing.

programme.title: E907 - The Kanga-ruse / The Walking Bed
programme.desc: When it appears the kangaroo mascot Crikey has vandalized the school, The Action News Team tries to prove his innocence. // Lincoln finds ways to break a family rule about hand-me-downs so he can get Lori's old mattress instead of his sisters.

programme.title: E242 - iBeat the Heat
programme.desc: When a heat wave hits Seattle and the power goes out, Spencer comes to the rescue with a Norwegian air conditioner.

programme.title: E294 - Single-Celled Defense / Buff for Puff
programme.desc: Sick of being stepped on, Plankton learns self-defense from Sandy. // Mr. Krabs steps out of his shell and into the gym after Larry shows him up at the beach.

programme.desc: Remaining contestants tackle a Mystery Box challenge set by Nagi Maehashi. While the mega Mystery Box features the most ingredients ever, the cooks have just 30 minutes to pull off a winning dish.

programme.desc: Sara and Russell are ready to escape the sweltering southern heat and start afresh in a charming fishing village along the East Coast. They're searching for the perfect home to embrace a coastal lifestyle.

programme.desc: Rachael honours her beloved grandfather by making his recipe for stuffed artichokes. She also prepares Roman-style artichokes, infused with fresh herbs and garlic and then sauteed in oil.

programme.desc: Vikkie and Wayne have a habit of cooking a nightly backup meal for their fussy kids, which has made their shopping bills and food waste skyrocket. Will their kids like what Prue and Rupy have planned?

programme.title: E2 - Dunoon
programme.desc: Keith and Kate return to the Scottish seaside town of Dunoon, where Kate has fond memories and family ties. But making a grand Victorian house work as a modern home proves challenging...

programme.desc: Nigella reveals a secret passion for one of the tastes of Italy with her dark liquorice pudding, before introducing us to the joys of fregola.

programme.title: E2 - Kruger's Pafuri
programme.desc: In the northern reaches of the Kruger National Park, life depends on one thing – water. In a land burdened by heat and drought a single ribbon cuts its reliable course through the wilderness. It’s a lifeline to all creatures, great and small.

programme.title: E2 - Battle to Save a Sea Lion
programme.desc: Battle wind and waves to find a sea lion trapped in a plastic ring. Then visit the rescue center, where over 80 orphan seals must be fed several times a day to prepare for release into the wild, and see an Amazonian duck get a miraculous operation.

programme.title: E3 - One Very Lost Sea Turtle
programme.desc: Follow the team in healing and releasing a grumpy sea turtle, and then meet a sea lion with an unusual injury that must be taken by crane to the rescue centre. Find out how the vet aids an aging fruit bat and a community rescues a one-eyed seal pup.

programme.desc: Travel to Tripura to take a trip back in time. We get a taste of the Reang way of life that includes learning the art of brewing rice beer, and eating fresh snails!

programme.title: Baogu At the Movie E278 -Cold War 1994
programme.desc: Baogu At The Movie brings you the most exclusive behind the scenes of recent local blockbusters. The most true story and sincere conversation behind every piece of dreamwork.

programme.title: Time Still Turns The Pages
programme.desc: High school teacher Cheng looks back to his repressed childhood memories, as he finds an anonymous suicide note in the classroom. He strives hard to prevent another tragedy from happening, meanwhile facing a series of family problems, his wife is divorcing him, and his father is dying.

programme.title: Remember What I Forgot
programme.desc: Anyone who has anything to do with the film industry in Hong Kong, must have heard of a film buff called Lil' Kim. He knows everything there is to know about filmmaking. Whether it's on the set, at the movie premiere or at a press conference, he always shows up uninvited. Nobody knows where he came from and why he showed up... Ginger Keung is the producer of a reality show who suspects Lil' Kim is in fact a film critic who pans movies to extort advertising dollars from film companies. She zeroes in on Lil' Kim as her next target and decides to dig into his elusive past...

programme.title: Baogu Produces -Deconstructing the Cold War Universe
programme.desc: Director Longman Leung is here to shed light on the mysteries of the “Cold War” series. What actually does the operation codename “Cold War” mean? Longman reveals that not a single shot had been fired in the first script while the foreshadowing in dialogue of 'Cold War' and 'Cold War 2' are going to be revealed in the sequel! Let's find out more behind-the-scenes stories of the “Cold War” series shared by Longman.

programme.title: The Case - Death Drugs
programme.desc: A young girl died of drug addiction, revealing that a new type of drug is spreading rapidly in Hong Kong, affecting young people. The police take the incident seriously and set up an elite team from various departments to eradicate the entire drug cartel. The team investigated from various aspects of tracking, undercover, and forensics, and finally found that the mastermind behind turned out to be a genius drug refiner.

programme.title: Safar
programme.desc: A pair of lovers are cruelly separated by destiny when the boy is diagnosed with terminal cancer. On his insistence, the girl settles down with another man, but he turns out to be a jealous husband.

programme.title: Khandani Shafakhana
programme.desc: Babita Bedi working as a medical representative and the only earner in the house. She has to run a fertility clinic for six months in order to sell it or else she will lose everything.

programme.title: E32
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E35
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 《超時空羅曼史》講述了民國功夫巨星向秦羽，因一場意外來到21世紀，與十八線編劇金阿銀相遇，兩人展開了奇妙浪漫又充滿戲劇性的愛情故事。

programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.desc: 《超時空羅曼史》講述了民國功夫巨星向秦羽，因一場意外來到21世紀，與十八線編劇金阿銀相遇，兩人展開了奇妙浪漫又充滿戲劇性的愛情故事。

programme.desc: When back-to-back shootings at women's clinics leave two healthcare providers dead, Hondo and the team investigate whether the shootings were politically motivated.

programme.title: E7 - Kiss The Cod And Make Them Die

programme.title: E20
programme.desc: Inspired by a true story and based on the hit eponymous Italian drama series, Doc begins its second season of the life-affirming medical drama following the heartbreak and victories of hard-charging, brilliant physician Dr. Amy Larsen (Molly Parker) as she rebuilds her life after a car crash erased eight years of her memory. This season, Amy will continue to confront hard truths about her missing years, work to repair fractured relationships and seek to reconcile the person she used to be with the one everyone else has come to know.

programme.desc: The brilliant yet unconventional attorney-turned-consultant ELSBETH returns for a third season with fresh cases, new characters and unexpected challenges for her and the 11th Precinct, led by her boss, Captain C.W. Wagner.

programme.title: The Movie Star Says -Manfred Wong (Part1)
programme.desc: Film producer Manfred Wong debuted as a scriptwriter who had been working for various film production companies in Hong Kong. Born in 1950s, he went through the heyday of film industry; witnessed the prosperity of homegrown productions in 1980s to 90s; heard rumor about a superstar being kidnapped to abrupt shooting; but also lamented for decade of steady decline of the city's film industry. Acted as a time witness, he is going to tell us the ups and downs of Hong Kong cinema.

programme.title: E3 - Nicky Winmar's Stand Against Racism
programme.desc: It's a day etched into Australian sporting folklore for all the wrong reasons. A moment on a footy field where Nicky Winmar, a proud Noongar man, called out racism.

programme.title: E102 - From Dubbo

programme.title: E11 - 征服百米雪坡 詮釋熱血團魂
programme.desc: 重磅打造的全明星爆笑旅行遊戲真人秀，由黃曉明、黃子韜、劉耀文、邵子恆、王鶴棣、于洋組成「宇宙爆閃團」，用高能抽象任務，打造解壓式快樂體驗，去有趣的地方做有意義的事；放下偶像包袱，發送獨一無二的快樂訊號。
